'''''Keydon''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] used by [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] forces during the [[Sepan Civil War]]. In an attempt to end the war by capturing the leaders of both the Dimoks and the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] boarded shuttle ''Keydon'', along with shuttle [[Phantele]] towards the end of the [[Sepan campaign]]. Following the boarding, Imperial forces did not discover the leaders of the Dimoks but instead discovered the children of Dimok leaders aboard ''Keydon''. After the ship was boarded the ''Keydon'' was destroyed. The Dimoks intended to use the children as hostages to seal a treaty between the Ripoblus and Dimok factions to join forces against the Imperial intervention.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
